page: Microsoft Azure F2ads_v7 is an x86_64 architecture virtual machine belonging to the Fadsv7 server family. Powered by an AMD processor and managed via the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor, this instance features 2 dedicated vCPUs and 8.0 GB of system memory, yielding a balanced allocation of 4.0 GB of RAM per core.

The instance is equipped with 236 GB of local disk storage and is Premium Storage capable, allowing for high-performance external disk attachments. It does not include any integrated GPU hardware or complimentary public IPv4 addresses.

Given its balanced 1:4 vCPU-to-RAM ratio and dedicated CPU allocation, the F2ads_v7 offers a cost-effective entry point for workloads requiring predictable compute performance without the overhead of larger instances. The combination of dedicated AMD execution threads and local storage makes this server type suitable for general-purpose applications, lightweight databases, web serving, and development environments.
description: Microsoft Azure F2ads_v7 is an x86_64 virtual machine from the Fadsv7 family, featuring 2 dedicated vCPUs powered by an AMD processor and managed via Microsoft Hyper-V. It is configured with 8.0 GB of system memory, providing 4.0 GB of RAM per core, and includes 236 GB of local disk storage with Premium Storage compatibility. Lacking integrated GPUs, this instance offers a balanced resource profile for workloads that require dedicated compute resources and local storage capacity. It is well-suited for general-purpose applications, lightweight database hosting, web serving, and software development environments.
